chunks.text: Good Status applies from CGPA 2.00 and above. Academic Probation may apply when CGPA is below 2.00. Academic Dismissal may apply if CGPA remains below 2.00 for three consecutive semesters.

Students may add courses without penalty up to the end of the first two weeks of a normal semester or the first week of a short semester. Late registration may be allowed up to the fourth week of a normal semester or second week of a short semester with approval and a RM50 penalty per course.

Course withdrawal is allowed after the first two weeks but before the thirteenth week of the normal semester, or after the first week but before the seventh week of the short semester. A W grade appears on the transcript and does not count toward GPA.
Students may withdraw completely from the University before the thirteenth week of the normal semester or before the seventh week of the short semester, subject to required approvals and clearances.

Students may apply for postponement with valid reasons, subject to approval by the Dean and VP Academic. Postponement is not allowed after the twelfth week of the long semester or after the sixth week of the short semester.

For March Semester 2026, registration for new students is 22 April 2026, first day of lecture is 27 April 2026, last day for add/drop is 01 May 2026, and final examinations run from 22 June 2026 to 02 July 2026.

chunks.reference: ACE305 – Bachelor of Civil Engineering with Honours
chunks.text: ACE305 is a full-time 4-year programme with 140 credits. The handbook lists March, June/July and Sept/Oct intakes.
The March 2026 handbook uses CIT312 for Bachelor of Software Engineering (Honours).
The March 2026 handbook uses CIT311 for Bachelor of Computer Science (Honours).
The March 2026 handbook includes CIT206 Diploma in Information Technology under the Department of Computing.
